title: Endless Cake
description: Simple Minecraft mod for Fabric that adds an infinite cake using the Dragon Egg as a crafting ingredient
body: # Endless Cake Endless Cake adds a cake crafted using the dragon egg. It is an infinite food source, but can only be placed down once (put it somewhere good!) It's crafted in the same way as a regular cake, replacing the chicken egg with the dragon egg (you monster!) look at it... so delicious... This mod was made LIVE on my Twitch channel. Come join the fun @ [twitch.tv/hugeblank](https://twitch.tv/hugeblank)
